query:x_above_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:x_above_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the supporting data points

query:x_below_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:x_below_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the supporting data points

query:y_above_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:y_above_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the supporting data points

query:y_below_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested count as an integer
query:y_below_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points at the centers of the supporting data points

query:largest_mean_x_category_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string
query:largest_mean_x_category_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer category's point cluster

query:smallest_mean_x_category_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string
query:smallest_mean_x_category_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer category's point cluster

query:largest_mean_y_category_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer category's point cluster

query:smallest_mean_y_category_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer category's point cluster
